title: 信息日报 2026-06-13

headline.title: SpaceX上市首日飙升19%，马斯克成全球首位万亿富翁
headline.summary: SpaceX在纳斯达克上市首日大涨19%，市值达2.2万亿美元，其创始人埃隆·马斯克身家跃升至1.11万亿美元，成为世界首位万亿富翁。此次IPO为华尔街史上最大规模。
headline.title_en: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
headline.summary_en: SpaceX surged 19% on its Nasdaq debut, reaching a $2.2 trillion valuation. Founder Elon Musk's net worth climbed to $1.11 trillion, making him the world's first trillionaire. The IPO was the largest in Wall Street history.
headline.original_title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
headline.reason: 该事件融合科技与金融两大领域，是全球资本市场里程碑，影响深远。
headline.reason_en: This event merges technology and finance, marking a milestone in global capital markets with far-reaching implications.
